mapper.sql: select c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.customer_type, c.phone, c.id_card_no, c.company_name, c.business_license_no, c.source_type, c.intent_level, c.intent_amount, c.status, c.user_id, c.dept_id, c.last_follow_time, c.next_follow_time, c.signed_time, c.sea_time, c.transfer_remark, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, u.user_name, d.dept_name from loan_customer c left join sys_user u on c.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into loan_customer( customer_name, customer_type, phone, id_card_no, company_name, business_license_no, source_type, intent_level, intent_amount, status, user_id, dept_id, last_follow_time, next_follow_time, signed_time, sea_time, transfer_remark, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{customerName}, #{customerType}, #{phone}, #{idCardNo}, #{companyName}, #{businessLicenseNo}, #{sourceType}, #{intentLevel}, #{intentAmount}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{lastFollowTime}, #{nextFollowTime}, #{signedTime}, #{seaTime}, #{transferRemark}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from loan_customer where customer_id in
#{customerId}
mapper.update: update loan_customer set user_id = #{userId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, transfer_remark = #{transferRemark}, status = 'PRIVATE', update_by = #{operator}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId}
update loan_customer set user_id = null, dept_id = null, status = 'SEA', sea_time = #{seaTime}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId}
update loan_customer set user_id = #{userId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, status = 'PRIVATE', update_by = #{operator}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId} and status = 'SEA'

update loan_customer set user_id = null, dept_id = null, status = 'SEA', sea_time = #{seaTime}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = sysdate() where status = 'PRIVATE' and signed_time is null and datediff(sysdate(), ifnull(last_follow_time, create_time)) >= #{releaseDays}
update loan_customer set status = 'SIGNED', signed_time = #{signedTime}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.select: select f.follow_id, f.customer_id, c.customer_name, f.follow_type, f.follow_content, f.valid_flag, f.intent_level, f.next_follow_time, f.user_id, f.user_name, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.remark from loan_customer_follow f left join loan_customer c on f.customer_id = c.customer_id where f.customer_id = #{customerId} order by f.follow_id desc
